ResearchProjectDef.label: rainwater collection
ResearchProjectDef.description: Build simple roof collectors that are attached to walls under constructed roofs and gather rainwater from nearby roof tiles into fresh-water tanks.

ResearchProjectDef.label: floor heating
ResearchProjectDef.description: Embed unregulated hydronic heating loops under constructed floors. Indoor loops transfer heat according to the heating-water-to-room temperature difference, while outdoor loops consume heat below 1 °C during precipitation to keep constructed floors clear of snow.

ResearchProjectDef.label: smart mixing valve
ResearchProjectDef.description: Build powered hydronic mixing valves that couple two adjacent heating-water circuits without merging them. The valve draws from the hotter source circuit and mixes heat into the receiving circuit to maintain a selected receiving-water temperature.
